items.title: West Asia War LIVE: Trump cancels Iran strikes, touts imminent deal
items.summary: Iran said it had not reached a final decision on a deal with Washington after U.S. President Donald Trump announced a "great settlement" to end the war

items.title: Princess Bha of Thailand, Second in Line to the Throne, Dies at 47
items.summary: Ever since she collapsed in a park three and a half years ago, speculation has swirled in Thailand about who could become the next monarch.

items.title: White House shows off cage match arena as corruption lawsuit looms
items.summary: White House officials previewed the grounds where they’ll host a cage match to celebrate US President Trump’s birthday.
